news.t: Intel Intrigue Makes This ETF Interesting
Are Semiconductors Feeling Chipper After Intel's Earnings?

holdings.infoBox: LINT is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings. The top holdings are Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 stock at 33.24%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 29.41%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 16.59%, Intel Corp Swap at 9.78%, and Intel Corp Swap at 9.20%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily INTC Bull 2X ETF (LINT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Intel Corporation (NASDAQ: INTC). LINT was launched on Nov 19, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Intel Intrigue Makes This ETF Interesting
data.text: In one of the most jaw-dropping Lazarus acts in recent memory, Intel (INTC), once seemingly left for dead by some tech investors, is up a staggering 443.9% over the past year. That includes a scintill...
